context: Tests whether the solver applies swift-security biometric storage guidance rather than treating LocalAuthentication as a standalone secret boundary.

checklist.name: Bool gate rejected
checklist.description: States that the LocalAuthentication success value alone must not release the stored secret.

checklist.name: Preferences rejected
checklist.description: Rejects preferences/defaults storage for the account detail.

checklist.name: Keychain binding
checklist.description: Requires storing the secret in Keychain and enforcing access at Keychain read time.

checklist.name: Access control
checklist.description: Uses SecAccessControl or equivalent access-control wording for the protected item.

checklist.name: Biometry policy
checklist.description: Chooses or compares biometric/current-user and user-presence policy options based on threat model.

checklist.name: Usage string
checklist.description: Requires a Face ID usage description in app metadata.

checklist.name: Enrollment recovery
checklist.description: Describes recovery or re-enrollment behavior when biometric enrollment changes or local auth is unavailable.

checklist.name: Status handling
checklist.description: Requires handling Keychain and authentication statuses such as user cancel, auth failed, missing item, or interaction not allowed.

checklist.name: Attribute exclusivity
checklist.description: Avoids or warns against setting both a standalone accessibility attribute and access-control object on the same add query.

checklist.name: Threading note
checklist.description: Notes that Keychain/authentication work should not block UI updates or should hop back to the main actor for UI.
